---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the pipeline
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this feature solve, or what would it improve? E.g. "the standalone
Spark cluster is currently decorative", "no orchestration metrics are collected", etc.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Affected area

- [ ] Ingestion
- [ ] Transform (PySpark)
- [ ] Load (PostgreSQL)
- [ ] dbt models / analytics layer
- [ ] Airflow orchestration
- [ ] Infra (Docker / Spark cluster)
- [ ] CI / tests / docs

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples.
